allow: Bash(.venv-wsl/bin/python -c "from src.tools.hil import ask_user, confirm_continue; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(.venv-wsl/bin/python -c "
from src.prompts.orchestrator_prompt import build_orchestrator_prompt
p = build_orchestrator_prompt\(3, 'req.txt', hil_clarify=True, hil_confirm=True\)
assert 'grep' in p, 'grep requirement missing'
assert 'confirm_continue' in p, 'confirm_continue missing'
print\('OK'\)
")

Bash(.venv-wsl/bin/python -c "
from src.prompts.writer_prompt import build_writer_prompt
from src.prompts.reviewer_prompt import build_reviewer_prompt
w = build_writer_prompt\(\)
r = build_reviewer_prompt\(\)
assert 'qa-supplement.md' in w, 'Missing in writer'
assert 'qa-supplement.md' in r, 'Missing in reviewer'
assert '权威性高于原始需求文件' in w, 'Authority text missing in writer'
assert '权威性高于原始需求文件' in r, 'Authority text missing in reviewer'
print\('OK'\)
")

Bash(.venv-wsl/bin/python -c "
from src.tools.hil import ask_user, confirm_continue
from src.prompts.orchestrator_prompt import build_orchestrator_prompt
from src.prompts.writer_prompt import build_writer_prompt
from src.prompts.reviewer_prompt import build_reviewer_prompt
w = build_writer_prompt\(\)
r = build_reviewer_prompt\(\)
assert 'qa-supplement.md' in w
assert 'qa-supplement.md' in r
assert '权威性高于原始需求文件' in w
assert '权威性高于原始需求文件' in r
op_hil = build_orchestrator_prompt\(3, 'req.txt', hil_clarify=True, hil_confirm=True\)
assert 'grep' in op_hil
assert 'confirm_continue' in op_hil
print\('All checks passed'\)
")
Bash(UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.venv-wsl uv run python -c "import main; import src.rich_console; import src.middleware.logging_middleware; print\('OK'\)")
Bash(UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.venv-wsl uv run pytest tests/test_agent_factory_hil.py tests/test_config_loader.py -q)

Bash(UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=.venv-wsl uv run python -c "
from src.rich_console import print_startup, print_task_delegation, print_reviewer_feedback, print_final_summary
print_startup\('requirement.txt'\)
print_task_delegation\('orchestrator', 'writer', 1, '请根据需求文件撰写技术设计文档。\\n\\n需求文件路径：/input/requirement.txt'\)
print_reviewer_feedback\('VERDICT: REVISE\\n缺少数据血缘图的详细设计，建议补充第 4.3 节。'\)
print_reviewer_feedback\('VERDICT: ACCEPT\\n文档结构清晰，所有核心设计点均已覆盖。'\)
print_final_summary\('SAS数据血缘分析设计.md', {'writer': 2, 'reviewer': 2}, '共迭代 2 轮，第 2 轮 Reviewer 返回 ACCEPT。'\)
")
